title: G.S.R. 397(E).—G.S.R. 45(E), dated the 19" January, 2018, wherein sale of petcoke are made only to the industrial units mentioned in the list annexed to the said notification as Annexure and any change in the said list shall be made on the recommendation of the concerned State Government and with the approval of the Central Pollution Control Board;

F-16017/04/2018-5 Tt (7)) Fedvor e fite, e wfer feroqur : gt aftrg=HT ATdE 19 SAEY, 2018 F ALALT; 45() F FTeT GO A S off i aero=a AT 25 wE, 2018 it srferg=aT AT AL, 495(3) F g santaa £ ofn MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st May, 2019 G.S.R. 397(E).—Whereas, sale and use of petcoke in lime kilns in the National Capital Region (NCR) States was notified vide notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change number G.S.R. 45(E), dated the 19" January, 2018, wherein sale of petcoke are made only to the industrial units mentioned in the list annexed to the said notification as Annexure and any change in the said list shall be made on the recommendation of the concerned State Government and with the approval of the Central Pollution Control Board; And Whereas, on the recommendation of the State Government of Rajasthan, Central Pollution Control Board has approved further addition of 71 lime kilns and amendment in the details of 10 lime kilns in the Annexure of the notifications mentioned above. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the aforesaid notification, namely;- -- 6 of 10 -- [T [I-=vg 3(i)] AT S92 STETER 7 In the said notification, in the Annexure, - (i) for serial numbers 66, 148, 169, 207, 222, 249, 255, 256, 289 and 346 the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely: - “66 Shree Balaji Lime Khasra No. 982/622, Vill. 3 2100 4410 420 Products Tadawas, Tehsil: Khinvsar, District: Nagaur 148 Gajanand Lime Khasra No. 422/652, Village: 4 3000 5625 600 Industries Tadawas, Tehsil: Khinvsar, District: Nagaur 341025 169 ‘White ‘N’ White Khasra No. 217/12, Village Basni | 4 2400 5040 480 Mineral Pst.
